pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates the location 'Temporary Fever Clinic' via the OpenMRS REST API.
verifier.py strictly evaluates if the actual retire reason string contains the lowercased expected value 'end of season'.
This specific URL path is not explicitly used or enforced by the task scripts.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes synthetically generated data; setup_task.sh dynamically creates the target location 'Temporary Fever Clinic' via the OpenMRS REST API. The verifier.py script enforces that this specific location is successfully retired and that its retireReason field contains 'end of season' (case-insensitive).
